entities.description: The status and methods used for the cultivation and production of pulses.

entities.description: The ability of pulse varieties to withstand attacks from diseases and pests.

entities.description: A micro-nutrient recommended for use to increase pulses production.

entities.name: MINIMUM SUPPORT PRICE
entities.description: A government-mandated price floor for agricultural products, found to be ineffective for pulses.

entities.name: MARKET PRICES
entities.description: The current prices of pulses in the market used to determine the MSP.
